name: Cous Cous Salad 2
recipeIngredient: Cook couscous according to package directions. Use the whole package, which makes about 6 cups. I use 3 tablespoons of vegetable chicken broth powder in the water.
recipeInstructions:
1. ADD: 1-3 cups chopped celery, 1/2 cup chopped green onions, and a can (16 oz.) of chickpeas.
2. Mix together turmeric to taste (about 1 1/2 teaspoons), curry powder (1 teaspoon or to taste), and enough fat-free mayo or salad dressing to moisten the mixture. You could mostly skip the dressing if you used fresh tomatoes instead. Let set overnight for flavors to mingle.
